rows.label: qev041312_MSG0001
rows.name:
Hmph... You will never be able to obtain it, but...
I do not dislike your spirit in single-mindedly
continuing to pursue the Gold Nopohippo Card.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041312_MSG0002
rows.name:
Enough! I have given up! The
Gold Nopohippo Card never existed
from the very beginning![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041312_MSG0003
rows.name:
I am... retiring from Miracolle! And
as a BLADE, I will capture every last
native creature here on Mira![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041312_MSG0004
rows.name:
...Hey, you there! If you give me a high-performance
hunting tool or hunting information, I will give
you a treasured Silver Rumedel Card![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041312_MSG0008
rows.name:
This is... a Ma-non Hunting Kit! I
am not quite sure how to use it,
but... It certainly seems amazing![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041312_MSG0009
rows.name:
Good! Then take this with you! It is
the super rare Silver Rumedel Card![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041312_MSG0010
rows.name:
...What? Are you searching
for the Gold Nopohippo Card?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041312_MSG0011
rows.name:
Hmph... Searching for such a thing is a waste of time.
I bought up nearly half of the Miracolle circulating
the market, and it did not come out, you know?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041312_MSG0012
rows.name:
...Even after hearing that, you
will not give up? Ignorance
truly is a terrifying thing.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041312_MSG0013
rows.name:
Then go ahead and struggle in
vain. Surely, good fortune will
visit someone like that.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041312_MSG0014
rows.name:
...Holding out on me? Fine
then, go wherever you please.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041312_MSG0018
rows.name:
The hunting knowledge of the
Bias, hm... This is indeed a
feral wisdom that we lack...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041312_MSG0019
rows.name:
...That was quite informative.
Please, take this with you. It is
the super rare Silver Rumedel Card![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041312_MSG0020
rows.name:
...What? Are you searching
for the Gold Nopohippo Card?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041312_MSG0021
rows.name:
Hmph... Searching for such a thing is a waste of time.
I bought up nearly half of the Miracolle circulating
the market, and it did not come out, you know?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041312_MSG0022
rows.name:
...Even after hearing that, you
will not give up? Ignorance
truly is a terrifying thing.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041312_MSG0023
rows.name:
Then go ahead and struggle in
vain. Surely, good fortune will
visit someone like that.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041312_MSG0024
rows.name:
...Holding out on me? Fine
then, go wherever you please.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041312_JNK0030
rows.name: Trade

rows.label: qev041312_SEL0031
rows.name: Teach the hunting knowledge of the Bias and receive the Silver Rumedel Card.

rows.label: qev041312_JNK0040
rows.name: Do not trade

rows.label: qev041312_SEL0041
rows.name: Do not trade yet and try searching for someone else.
